char_status: Deputy director of 狩灵协会1科, Ninth bearer of 苍白爪牙
char_overview: Ninth 苍白爪牙. Body burns at five times speed. Knows her remaining years.
char_looks: White wavy long hair. Pale gray, heavy dark circles eyes. White jacket and trousers, black shirt, white tie, black shoes. Claw encasing left arm, 心灵遮断合金 blades. Shoulder mount: three injectors. Glucose-protein, adrenaline-stimulant, and a red ampoule for terminal overload.
char_flaws: Joints ache constantly. Has stopped imagining a future. Speaks so rarely her voice cracks.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-暴食: Permanently active. Quintuples metabolic rate, speed, strength, and cellular repair. Consumes energy relentlessly. Taste obliterated by taste bud necrosis. Ages five years per calendar year past thirty.
char_mission: Enforce 狩灵协会1科 authority against threats 常规狩灵 cannot handle.

char_relationships.1科科长: The seventh Black. Leaves a warm drink on her desk after every mission. Will retrieve the arm guard when the time comes.
